'''Kneebs''' were small, rodentlike creatures with yellow fur. The [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] considered them a delicacy and used the cured hides to cover luxury items.<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> They were apparently named for the cries they made.

Transporting crates of kneebs was part of a lucrative shipping business. One thousand kneebs were slaughtered and served at the wedding feast of [[Gorga Desilijic Aarrpo/Legends|Gorga Desilijic Aarrpo]] and [[Anachro]] the [[H'uun]].

{{Creature-stub}}
